name: Bodyweight Squat
description: A simple squat using only bodyweight.

name: Glute Bridge
description: Lift hips upward while lying on your back.

name: Push-Up (Knee)
description: Beginner push-up variation using knees for support.

name: Dead Bug
description: Opposite arm/leg extension while stabilizing core.

name: Reverse Lunge
description: Step backward into a lunge, alternating legs.
